en: You know what I meant to mean Do you even know how smart I am in Spanish
ko: 내 말이 무슨 뜻인지 알잖아. 내가 스페인어로 얼마나 똑똒한지 알아?

en: experienced a situation where it was difficult to express your thoughts in English
ko: 영어로 생각을 표현하기 어려웠던 상황을 겪어본 적이

en: Share your experience with us down in the comments below
